title: What Is the Modern Data Stack? Layers, Benefits and Best Practices
description: The modern data stack comprises cloud-native, modular tools that centralize data in a warehouse, transform it reliably, and enable analysis and action. It replaces legacy on-premise systems with scalable, governed alternatives.
author: Ayonika Bose

title: We Replaced a $15k Revenue Execution Platform with a Simple Sigma Workflow
description: How we replaced a third-party SaaS revenue execution platform with an internal Sigma workflow that automates deal notifications and celebrations in Slack.
author: Ayonika Bose

title: When Does Talking About a Dog Increase Your Sales Win Rate?
description: A Sigma Labs analysis of our own sales team's Gong recordings, examining how discussing animals during sales calls impacts win rates and deal closure.
author: Ayonika Bose

title: How Snowflake's Connector for Google Analytics Centralizes Marketing Data
description: How Snowflake's connector for Google Analytics raw data solved the challenge of migrating from Universal Analytics to GA4 — addressing data sampling limitations with a unified approach to granular marketing data.
author: Ayonika Bose
